chunks.text: Ruzena Bajcsy is named in list of “Seven over 70” - EECS at Berkeley Prof. Ruzena Bajcsy has been named on MIT Technology Review’s “ Seven over 70 ” list, giving recognition to innovators over 70 who are still working. Prof. Bajcsy is a roboticist still actively publishing at the age of 83. She is also director emerita of CITRIS (Center for Information Technology Research in the Interest of Society) and her current research focuses on AI, computational biology and biosystems. Categories Faculty Honors View Open Faculty Positions
